items.title: ‘Go and get him’ – England legend Wayne Rooney names boss he would like to replace Thomas Tuchel after World Cup failure
items.summary: WAYNE ROONEY has urged England to approach Pep Guardiola as Thomas Tuchel's replacement after the Three Lions crashed out of the World Cup. England were sent packing by Argentina in the semi-finals after an agonising collapse saw Lionel Messi and Co score twice in the last seven minutes. Tuchel has

items.title: Why third-place play-off against France is huge for Tuchel and England
items.summary: England are in the midst of a run of three matches against the top three sides in world football. That is unprecedented.

items.title: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 41
items.summary: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?

items.title: Tuchel defiant in face of criticism over decisions in England exit: ‘I have no regrets’
